name: SEDA Official Oracle Programs
description: The official registry of SEDA oracle programs including community contributions

crypto.name: Cryptocurrency
crypto.description: Programs that fetch cryptocurrency prices and data

equities.name: Equities
equities.description: Programs for stock and equity market data

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Simple price feed programs without complex processing

ema.name: EMA
ema.description: Programs using Exponential Moving Average calculations

session-aware.name: Session Aware
session-aware.description: Programs aware of market trading sessions

batch.name: Batch
batch.description: Programs that process multiple assets in a single request

pyth.name: Pyth Network
pyth.description: Programs using Pyth Network as data source

dxfeed.name: dxFeed
dxfeed.description: Programs using dxFeed as data source

stork.name: Stork
stork.description: Programs using Stork as data source

hyperliquid.name: Hyperliquid
hyperliquid.description: Programs using Hyperliquid as data source

multi-source.name: Multi-source
multi-source.description: Programs aggregating data from multiple sources

bid-ask.name: Bid-Ask
bid-ask.description: Programs providing bid and ask prices

programs.name: Synco Cross-Rate
programs.description: Derives a cross-rate between two assets by fetching both Pyth prices and dividing base by quote. Returns JSON with the computed rate and timestamp.

base_feed_id.description: Pyth feed ID for the base asset (e.g. ETH/USD)

quote_feed_id.description: Pyth feed ID for the quote asset (e.g. USDC/USD). The fetcher divides base by quote automatically.

scale.description: Optional power-of-10 scaling factor applied to the cross-rate

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the price data

programs.name: Synco Price Feed
programs.description: Fetches a single asset's USD price from Pyth via SEDA proxies (Triton with Hermes fallback) and encodes it as a 64-byte binary payload for on-chain consumption via FastAdapter.

quote_asset.description: Optional Pyth feed ID for a quote asset to divide by

scale.description: Optional power-of-10 scaling factor applied to the price

outputSchema.description: 64-byte binary: [16 zero bytes][16-byte u128 price BE][24 zero bytes][8-byte u64 timestamp BE]

price.description: u128 price value (big-endian at byte offset 16)

timestamp.description: u64 Unix timestamp in seconds (big-endian at byte offset 56)
